headline: N2Growth Named to Forbes' List of America's Best Executive Recruiting Firms for Tenth Consecutive Year
summary: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania--(Newsfile Corp. - May 5, 2026) - N2Growth, a global executive search and leadership advisory firm, has been named to the 2026 Forbes list of America's Best Executive Recruiting Firms for the tenth consecutive year, marking a full decade of recognition and continuing its record as a top 20 firm for every year since the list's inception. To put this achievement in perspective, the United States Census Bureau's most recent data counts 5,897 executive search firms...

headline: How The Medtronic (MDT) Story Is Shifting As Guidance Meets Mixed Wall Street Views
summary: Medtronic's fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$109.08 to US$108.00, signaling only a modest reset in the analyst pricing framework. This small move lines up with a mixed set of research views, where some firms are cutting targets while others are nudging them higher or initiating at stronger levels. These moves reflect different levels of confidence in guidance and the product pipeline. As you read on, you will see what is driving this ongoing debate and how to keep track...
